items.copy: The most useful detail in Bank of America’s EricaAssist upgrade is not the model. It is the placement: AI assembles guidance inside the service employee’s workflow while the employee remains responsible for the conversation. For credit-union contact centers, that suggests a practical sequence—start with approved-source retrieval and next-step prompts, measure accuracy and repeat contacts alongside speed, and keep account changes behind existing approvals. What evidence would your team require before putting real-time AI guidance beside frontline staff? https://creditunionainews.com/news/bank-of-america-ericaassist-generative-ai.html

note: Beginning after trackingPolicyEffectiveAt, every queued LinkedIn item must keep articleUrl canonical, include a UTM-tagged distributionUrl, use distributionUrl in copy, and pass the tracked production scheduler. The July 22 post is retained as an explicitly untagged timing baseline.
